response.justification: Mohammed has strong technical depth, open-source contributions, and leadership experience across diverse stacks and domains, aligning well with the role’s technical and architectural demands; however, his German proficiency is only basic (not C1 as required), and there is limited evidence of formal project management, UML expertise, or executive-level client advisory experience, which are critical for this senior consulting role.
strengths: Extensive open-source contributions with real-world impact (e.g., GISCollective)
Proven full-stack leadership across multiple technologies and architectures
Strong track record in mentoring, workshops, and team knowledge sharing
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, falling far short of C1 requirement
No explicit mention of UML, requirements management, or formal IT architecture frameworks
Lacks clear evidence of client-facing advisory or strategic project leadership in IT consulting
